issues.description: Missing first effect entirely. Card has two effects: (1) 'Once Per Turn' protection effect that returns DON!! to deck when {Donquixote Pirates} Character would be removed by opponent's effect, and (2) the OnAttack effect. DSL only includes the OnAttack effect.
OnAttack effect missing DON!! cost condition. Effect text states 'DON!! −1:' indicating a DON!! cost of 1 must be paid. DSL has no cost/condition for the DON!! expenditure.
Target should specify 'up to 1' opponent Character, not unlimited. Current scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' implies single selection but lacks the 'up to' qualifier for optional targeting.
